creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Guillaume Outters from comment #33)

> IT WORKS!
> 
> Thank you very much for having taken the time to review the whole code, putting the
> missing spin_locks where necessary. It reminds me those good old times of courses about
> mutex locking…

It was only your hard work tracking it down to the lists that made me go there in the end.  I hope that for some bits it's not a changed timing.  I'll commit that, MFC it in a few dats and we'll get wider testing.

I'll also be curious if it also helps Oleg?
